lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has a few minor scratches but no significant damage. The interior shows light wear from regular use. Mechanically, the car is reliable and has been well-maintained.

Looking for an affordable way to get into a classic model? This car is a fantastic opportunity for a dedicated mechanic or a DIY lover! While it requires significant mechanical and cosmetic repairs to return to its former glory, it's a solid foundation for a rewarding restoration project. Grab this bargain and start your next automotive adventure today!

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing as though it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, original factory shine and no imperfections or scratches. Inside, the interior is pristine, showing zero signs of wear, and all electronic features function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in top-tier shape, having been meticulously maintained with a complete service history. A buyer can expect a collector-quality vehicle that requires absolutely no additional work or investment.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has some minor surface scratches. The interior shows light wear from regular use. Mechanically, the car is reliable and has been well-maintained.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing as though it just left the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, with no chips, scratches, or blemishes, and the body panels are perfectly aligned. Inside, the interior remains in a pristine state; the upholstery is unmarked, and all technological features and comfort amenities are in perfect working order. Mechanically, the car is exceptional, having been meticulously cared for with all service records up to date. A buyer can expect a car that looks and drives like new, requiring no immediate attention or repairs.
Mint condition.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has been subjected to a rigorous inspection process to ensure it meets our standards for performance and reliability. Featuring a sophisticated interior and a robust powertrain, it offers a refined driving experience for the discerning professional. This offering represents a superior value proposition for those seeking a dependable, high-quality automobile.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s honestly been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has been super dependable for all my trips. It runs like a dream and is just waiting for someone new to take it on its next adventure! If you're looking for a well-loved, reliable ride that still looks great on the road, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin!

Offering a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six power plant. This high-revving unit utilizes six individual throttle bodies for instantaneous response, paired with a tactile 6-speed manual transmission. Critical maintenance has been addressed, including rear subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive double-VANOS overhaul to ensure peak variable valve timing performance. The factory limited-slip differential provides exceptional corner-exit traction, while the suspension retains its communicative geometry. While the exterior shows minor signs of spirited use, the drivetrain and chassis are dialed in for a
Vehicle in good condition. Mechanically sound. Clean title. Routine maintenance completed. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained luxury sedan offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior features a deep midnight blue metallic finish that still holds a brilliant shine, with only minor cosmetic stone chips on the front fascia consistent with regular highway use. Inside, the premium charcoal leather upholstery is supple and clean, showing only light natural creasing on the driver’s bolster. All cabin electronics, including the dual-zone climate control and the upgraded surround-sound system, function flawlessly. Mechanically, this vehicle is in excellent health; the engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts are crisp, and the suspension remains tight and responsive. It has recently undergone a full multi-point inspection, including a fresh oil service and a brake fluid flush. The tires have ample tread remaining for several seasons of driving. We have a comprehensive folder of service records available for your review. This is a solid, reliable vehicle ready for its next owner to drive home today.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, this vehicle has been maintained to a rigorous standard, ensuring both mechanical reliability and aesthetic appeal. The exterior retains its luster, while the interior cabin reflects a history of careful stewardship. Fully vetted through our comprehensive diagnostic process, this unit delivers a confident driving experience and represents an astute acquisition for those prioritizing value and proven performance. We invite you to inspect this well-appointed vehicle at your earliest convenience.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that balances performance with enduring value. Thoroughly inspected to ensure long-term reliability, this specimen stands as a testament to responsible ownership and remains in commendable condition.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s been such a joy to own. It's in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained, so it's ready to hit the road for its next adventure with you! Perfect for daily commutes or fun weekend trips, this car is reliable and honestly just a blast to drive. Come check it out and see why I've loved it so much!

The Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission offers precise engagement, paired with a variable M-differential for optimal corner-exit traction. Used car. Good condition. Clean interior. Mechanically sound. Regular maintenance performed.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. Meticulously maintained, the exterior maintains a deep, lustrous shine, with only minor road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of major blemishes, and all electronic features—from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—function flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, benefiting from a comprehensive service history and a recent full synthetic oil change. It handles with precision and offers a confident, stable ride. This is a reliable, high-performing car that has been treated with respect and is ready for its next chapter. It represents an excellent value for a driver who appreciates quality and longevity.

This expertly maintained vehicle exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. Offering a balanced synthesis of performance and reliability, this model has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for the road. A distinguished choice for those seeking quality and proven longevity in a pre-owned executive automobile.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained to preserve its mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal, it offers a refined driving experience for the discerning owner. Every component has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and safety. A premier choice for those seeking a dependable, high-caliber automobile.

Hey there! I’m selling my reliable ride that’s been so good to me. It’s in great shape and runs like a dream—perfect for your daily commute or weekend adventures! I’ve taken really good care of it, and it's ready for its next home. Come take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and an 8,000 RPM redline. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from a documented rear subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive VANOS system refresh. It retains its original suspension geometry with updated bushings for sharpened turn-in and mechanical grip. While the exterior shows minor road wear consistent with its age, the mechanical vitals—including rod bearing service and valve adjustments—are current, ensuring this M-car performs exactly as the M-Division intended.
Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable performance. New tires.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition, both mechanically and aesthetically. The exterior paint retains a deep, glossy shine, with only minor stone chips as expected from responsible road use. Inside, the cabin is a testament to careful ownership; the premium leather seats are supple with minimal wear, and all electronic features—including the navigation system, heated seats, and dual-zone climate control—function flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts with precision, benefiting from a consistent service history and recent fluid changes. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This car offers a refined and reliable driving experience for its next owner, combining luxury with proven durability.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional value proposition for the discerning driver. Featuring a comprehensive service history and robust mechanical integrity, it delivers a refined and reliable driving experience. Both the exterior and interior reflect high standards of previous ownership, ensuring a sophisticated presence on the road. A premier selection for those seeking quality performance and enduring style.

This distinguished vehicle offers a sophisticated blend of performance and reliability, ideally suited for the discerning motorist. Maintained to a high standard, the automobile exhibits consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. Having undergone a comprehensive professional inspection, this unit ensures a dependable driving experience without compromising on executive appeal.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been absolute gold. It’s in really wonderful shape and has been super well-loved—perfect for someone who wants a reliable car that still looks and feels great on the road. Everything runs smoothly, and I’ve kept up with all the maintenance. You’re going to love driving this one! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This 996.2 Carrera features the high-revving 3.6L M96 flat-six engine paired with a precise 6-speed manual transaxle. Mechanical highlights include a documented IMS bearing retrofit and a recent cooling system overhaul. The suspension geometry remains true, utilizing Bilstein B6 dampers for enhanced rebound control, while the factory-spec Brembo monoblock calipers offer firm pedal feel and consistent thermal management. A mechanically sound driver's car that balances analog engagement with reliable performance.
Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Clean title. Routine maintenance performed.

This vehicle is a prime example of a well-maintained daily driver that balances performance with comfort. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor road wear expected of a car that has been enjoyed and cared for. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean; the seats are supportive and free of tears, and every button and dial functions exactly as it should. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, benefiting from a consistent maintenance schedule and a recent oil change. The tires have plenty of tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. Whether you’re commuting or heading out on a weekend road trip, this car offers a reliable and enjoyable driving experience. It’s a solid, honest vehicle ready for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, representing a superior balance of performance and long-term reliability. Meticulously maintained and rigorously inspected, this automobile offers a refined driving experience and remains in commendable condition throughout. It serves as an exceptional investment for the discerning driver who values both prestige and proven mechanical integrity.
